author: mwahahahaa
orig: w chuju to mam, to niech wyjebia ta gre z steama i wypierdalaja robic hot dogi do zabki
en: I don't give a damn about this, so they should take this game off Steam and fuck off and make hot dogs in the morning.
pt: Eu não dou a mínima para isso, então eles deveriam tirar esse jogo do Steam, se foder e fazer cachorro-quente pela manhã.
label: xenophobic

context.author: tsuakashi
context.orig: Kurwa <48h od zgłoszenia i dalej bez odp f <:FeelsBadMan:662746511649800212>
context.en: Fuck <48 hours from reporting and still no response f <:FeelsBadMan:662746511649800212>
context.pt: Foda-se <48 horas desde o relatório e ainda sem resposta f <:FeelsBadMan:662746511649800212>

context.author: _i.p.p.o
context.orig: ustawienia. inne rozwiązano problem z ekiwipunkiem steam czekasz 1min reset gry i kikasz na pocztę 10sek odśwież i skrzynia jest
context.en: settings. other, the problem with the Steam inventory was solved, wait 1 minute, reset the game and click on the mail, refresh 10 seconds and the chest is there
context.pt: configurações. outro, o problema do inventário Steam foi resolvido, espere 1 minuto, reinicie o jogo e clique no mail, atualize 10 segundos e o baú está lá

context.author: _i.p.p.o
context.orig: co jakiś czas tak będziesz robił będziesz miał skrzynkę czytaj aktualizacje będziesz wiedział zamiast się wkur 🙂
context.en: you do this from time to time, you will have an inbox, read updates, you will know instead of getting angry :)
context.pt: você faz isso de vez em quando, você terá uma caixa de entrada, lerá as atualizações, você saberá em vez de ficar com raiva :)

context.author: mwahahahaa
context.orig: Dalej skrzynki nie lecą  do kurwy nędzy?
context.en: The boxes are still not going to hell?
context.pt: As caixas ainda não vão para o inferno?
context.label: clean

context.author: _i.p.p.o
context.orig: przecież pisali że 8.06 będzie aktualizacja że przes kurwy które hax używają serwer jebali  serwer nie wyrabiał od tego
context.en: after all, they wrote that 8.06 will be an update, that the whores who use hax use the server, the server didn't work because of it
context.pt: afinal escreveram que 8.06 vai ser uma atualização, que as putas que usam hax usam o servidor, o servidor não funcionou por causa disso

context.author: _i.p.p.o

context.en: then don't play man, it's a free game
